name: Brussels Sprouts Soup
recipeIngredient: or 10 oz. package frozen brussels sprouts thawed
1/2 lb Kielbasa or other smoked sausage, sliced 1/4" thick
2 small Boiling potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve half a cup of the smallest brussels sprouts.
2. In a food processor, chop the remaining brussels sprouts coarsely.
3. In a large saucepan, brown the sausage over moderately high heat, turning it occasionally and drain it on paper towels.
4. In the fat left in the saucepan, cook the onion over moderately low heat, stirring until it is softened.
5. Add the chopped brussels sprouts, sausage, potatoes, broth, and water to the saucepan.
6. Bring the liquid to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer the soup for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
7. Divide the soup between two heated bowls.
8. Makes 4 cups, serving 2.
